examples.text: The city now faced timber shortages and the impacts of severe erosion and frequent flooding that threatened food supplies.
examples.explanation: 这句话的意思是：这座城市如今面临木材短缺，以及严重侵蚀和频繁洪水对粮食供应造成的威胁。其中 timber 在句中意思是“木材”。

source.text: How Japan saved its biggest city from collapse - Roman Krznaric

reviewSessions.example_text: However, it was on the verge of ecological collapse. Years of intense logging had led to massive deforestation. The city now faced timber shortages and the impacts of severe erosion and frequent flooding that threatened food supplies. But over just a few decades,
reviewSessions.feedback: 未作答，未体现对 timber 的理解。这里 timber 指“木材、木料”。
missing_points: 在句中 timber shortages 指“木材短缺”
